blended.narrative: Arapahoe Basin is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 7.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 8" over the past week. Current depth: 40".
